narrative_beat: Retorno da galeria de pergaminhos com seis molduras, a sexta ainda vazia iluminada por feixe dourado vertical

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a grand gallery wall displaying six ornate golden frames in a row, five frames contain aged parchment scrolls with faded ink, the sixth frame on the far right is empty and illuminated by a single vertical beam of golden divine light from above
subject.focal_point: the sixth empty frame bathed in golden light
subject.secondary: five completed parchments with wax seals inside their frames, cobweb-thin dust in the air

environment.location: a vast cathedral-like gallery with stone walls and vaulted ceiling
environment.time_of_day: dim interior with single shaft of divine light
environment.atmosphere: expectant, terminal, the final slot awaits its prophecy

composition.foreground: six golden frames in warm tones, the empty one glowing intensely
composition.midground: stone gallery wall with carved arches
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white vaulted ceiling fading into darkness

lighting.key_light: single vertical beam of warm golden light from above illuminating the sixth frame
lighting.fill_light: faint amber candlelight reflecting off the five parchments
lighting.rim_light: gold edges on all six frames
lighting.shadow_quality: deep hard-edged Caravaggio shadows between frames

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers throughout the gallery

mood.emotion: expectation, the prophecy wall is almost complete

symbolism.primary: five fulfilled predictions, the sixth awaiting — the pattern demands completion
symbolism.secondary: divine light marks the vacancy as intentional

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only
tack-sharp focus across full depth of field

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
